steps.title: Find the common factor
steps.content: The terms $15x$ and $24$ share a greatest common factor of $3$. That means each term can be rewritten as a multiple of $3$.

steps.title: Check by distributing
steps.content:
Distribute $3$ back into the parentheses to confirm the expression returns to the original:
$$3(5x+8)=15x+24$$

steps.title: Select the equivalent form
steps.content: The equivalent expression is $3(5x+8)$, which is one of the choices. The answer is C.
